speaker:
FIRST
               
              ROMAN
text: This will I carry to Rome.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              ROMAN
text: And I this.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              ROMAN
text: A murrain on ’t! I took this for silver.

speaker: MARTIUS
text: See here these movers that do prize their hours

speaker: MARTIUS
text: At a cracked drachma. Cushions, leaden spoons,

speaker: MARTIUS
text: Irons of a doit, doublets that hangmen would

speaker: MARTIUS
text: Bury with those that wore them, these base slaves,

speaker: MARTIUS
text: Ere yet the fight be done, pack up. Down with them!

speaker: MARTIUS
text: And hark, what noise the General makes! To him!

speaker: MARTIUS
text: There is the man of my soul’s hate, Aufidius,

speaker: MARTIUS
text: Piercing our Romans. Then, valiant Titus, take

speaker: MARTIUS
text: Convenient numbers to make good the city,

speaker: MARTIUS
text: Whilst I, with those that have the spirit, will haste

speaker: MARTIUS
text: To help Cominius.

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Worthy sir, thou bleed’st.

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Thy exercise hath been too violent

speaker: LARTIUS
text: For a second course of fight.

speaker: MARTIUS
text: Sir, praise me not.

speaker: MARTIUS
text: My work hath yet not warmed me. Fare you well.

speaker: MARTIUS
text: The blood I drop is rather physical

speaker: MARTIUS
text: Than dangerous to me. To Aufidius thus

speaker: MARTIUS
text: I will appear and fight.

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Now the fair goddess Fortune

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Fall deep in love with thee, and her great charms

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Misguide thy opposers’ swords! Bold gentleman,

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Prosperity be thy page!

speaker: MARTIUS
text: Thy friend no less

speaker: MARTIUS
text: Than those she placeth highest! So farewell.

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Thou worthiest Martius!

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Go sound thy trumpet in the marketplace.

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Call thither all the officers o’ th’ town,

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Where they shall know our mind. Away!
